scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && nest build
scripts.test:extraction: node --require ts-node/register --test test/course-pack-extraction.test.ts test/course-pack-graph.test.ts test/course-pack-blueprint.test.ts test/course-pack-support-level.test.ts
scripts.test:activation: node --require ts-node/register --test test/course-pack-confirmation.test.ts test/course-pack-activation.test.ts test/course-pack-engine-integration.test.ts test/course-pack-plan-refresh.test.ts test/course-pack-refresh-handoff.test.ts test/course-pack-follow-through.test.ts test/course-pack-progress-memory.test.ts test/course-pack-recurring-focus.test.ts test/course-pack-recurring-resolution.test.ts
scripts.test:qa: pnpm run test:intake && pnpm run test:extraction && pnpm run test:activation && pnpm run test:drift && pnpm run test:management && pnpm run test:admin
scripts.verify:programming-observability: pnpm run seed:week1 && node scripts/verify-programming-telemetry.mjs && node scripts/verify-alpha-readiness.mjs
